summary: Iteration 118: Tested Mira behavior framework - 5 features. Backend API (11/11 tests passed). Frontend has 1 bug: MiraVoiceAssistant shows old welcome message instead of mandatory opening line.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows old welcome message ('Hey there! 🐾 I'm Mira!') instead of mandatory opening line ('Hi, I'm Mira. I can help explain things, guide you to the right place, or connect you with our Concierge.')
ui_bugs.root_cause: Two conflicting useEffect hooks at lines 175-186 and 353-362. The second useEffect with setTimeout(0) overrides the first one.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Remove or comment out the second useEffect (lines 353-362) that sets the old welcome message

verified_features.details: Tooltip shows '👋 Ask Mira!' and label shows 'Mira ✨' correctly

verified_features.feature: Backend Mira chat returns mandatory opening line
verified_features.details: API response starts with 'Hi, I'm Mira. I can help explain things, guide you to the right place, or connect you with our Concierge.'
Response includes weight, exercise, joint health tips specific to Golden Retrievers

verified_features.feature: Mira escalates immediately for emergency keywords
verified_features.details: Emergency keywords (bleeding, not breathing, seizure, missing) trigger pillar='emergency' and ticket_type='emergency'

verified_features.feature: Voice Mira has health escalation patterns
verified_features.details: Frontend COMMAND_PATTERNS includes health_escalation and medication_escalation with proper responses and navigation to /care

action_items: FIX: Remove duplicate useEffect in MiraVoiceAssistant.jsx (lines 353-362) that overrides the mandatory opening line
critical_code_review_comments: MiraVoiceAssistant.jsx has conflicting useEffect hooks - lines 175-186 set MIRA_OPENING but lines 353-362 override it with old welcome message
The setTimeout(0) in the second useEffect causes it to run after the first, overwriting the mandatory opening line
Backend mira_routes.py correctly implements all features: mandatory opening, breed guidance, emergency escalation, section-aware behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 118 tested Mira behavior framework. Backend API fully working. Frontend bug: MiraVoiceAssistant.jsx shows old welcome message instead of mandatory opening line due to conflicting useEffect hooks. Fix needed at lines 353-362.

reproduction_steps: 2. Click on Mira floating button (top right)
3. Observe the first message in the chat modal
rca_of_the_issue.expected: Hi, I'm Mira. I can help explain things, guide you to the right place, or connect you with our Concierge.
rca_of_the_issue.actual: Hey there! 🐾 I'm Mira! How can I help you and your pup today? You can type or tap the mic to speak!
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Two useEffect hooks in MiraVoiceAssistant.jsx both try to set the initial message. The first (lines 175-186) sets MIRA_OPENING correctly, but the second (lines 353-362) uses setTimeout(0) which executes after and overwrites it with the old welcome message.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Remove or comment out the second useEffect at lines 353-362
